name: Tom Nomad
title: Full Stack Software Engineer
tagline: 5+ years building scalable web products — from the office and from the road.

bullets: Led migration of monolithic Rails app to microservices, reducing p99 latency by 40%
Owned frontend rebuild in React + TypeScript, shipping 3 major product features per quarter
Mentored 2 junior engineers and established code review standards across the team
Built real-time collaboration features using WebSockets serving 10k+ concurrent users
Designed and implemented RESTful API consumed by web and mobile clients
Reduced CI pipeline time from 18 min to 6 min through parallelisation and caching
Delivered 8 client projects spanning e-commerce, SaaS dashboards, and marketing sites
Stack ranged from Next.js + Stripe to Django + Postgres depending on project needs

projects.name: Project Nomadica
projects.description: This site — a travel blog, developer portfolio, and bucket list tracker built with React, TypeScript, and Vite.

projects.name: TrailSync
projects.description: GPS track aggregator that syncs hikes and rides from Strava, Garmin, and GPX files into a unified map view.

projects.name: Pocketledger
projects.description: Lightweight personal finance tracker with multi-currency support, built for travellers managing money across borders.
